evals.prompt: What's a native Kannada word for 'democracy'? I want the DNS Bhat style — no Sanskrit borrowings.
evals.expected_output: Should produce ಮಂದಿಯಾಳ್ವಿಕೆ (mandiyALvike), with breakdown: ಮಂದಿ (people) + ಆಳ್ವಿಕೆ (rule/governance). Should include Eke romanization and morphological analysis.

assertions.name: contains-eke-romanization
assertions.description: Output includes Eke romanization (should not contain kh, gh, bh, ph, dh, th aspirates)

assertions.name: contains-morphological-breakdown
assertions.description: Output explains the component roots and suffixes

assertions.name: no-sanskrit-borrowing
assertions.description: Output does NOT use ಪ್ರಜಾಪ್ರಭುತ್ವ (Sanskrit-derived democracy term)

evals.prompt: Can you give me Ellara Kannada words for a batch of science terms: biology, telescope, thermometer, astronaut, photograph?
evals.expected_output: Should produce native Kannada equivalents for all 5 terms using neo-classical root mappings: bio→ಉಸಿರಿ, tele→ಗೆಂಟು, thermo→ಬಿಸಿ, astro→ಬಾನ್, photo→ಬೆಳಕು. Should include a table or structured list with Eke romanizations and breakdowns.

assertions.name: includes-breakdowns
assertions.description: Output includes morphological breakdown for at least some terms

evals.prompt: I need to write a Kannada tech article. Help me coin Dravidian words for: software, programmer, algorithm, database, and artificial intelligence.
evals.expected_output: Should produce creative native coinages for all 5 CS terms using DNS Bhat methodology. No Sanskrit borrowings. Should show strategy selection (suffix vs compound), pick native roots, apply morphological rules, and provide Eke romanization with breakdown.

assertions.name: no-english-loanwords-unexplained
assertions.description: Output does not simply transliterate the English words

assertions.name: includes-eke-romanization
assertions.description: Output includes Eke romanization (lowercase with uppercase retroflexes)

assertions.name: explains-formation-strategy
assertions.description: Output explains why certain formation strategies were chosen
